overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit Mediterranean-style village at golden hour. The character descends narrow cobblestone streets between stone walls, passes through an archway into a colorful town square, and approaches a waterfront tower with mountains and a lake visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street descending toward waterfront

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily down the narrow cobblestone path between high stone walls, heading toward the distant lake view

entered.detail: tall stone building with small windows and weathered facade
rough stone wall lining the right side of the narrow path
blue lake visible in the valley below between the buildings
hazy mountains forming the backdrop beyond the lake
tall slender evergreen tree rising above the buildings

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends a narrow cobblestone street flanked by stone walls and medieval buildings, with a scenic view of a distant lake and mountains ahead. The golden hour sunlight casts long warm shadows across the path as a few villagers walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance archway transitioning to town square

events.description: passing under the large stone archway into the main village square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks under the stone archway and enters the bustling village square, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman wearing a green headscarf and cream blouse walking past Geralt

entered.detail: large weathered stone archway marking the village entrance
distinctive building with bright teal plaster walls and wooden beams
tall stone tower with red terracotta roof visible in the distance
cluster of buildings with ochre and red painted facades

segments.scene_description: The narrow street opens as Geralt approaches and passes under a grand stone archway into the village proper. Colorful buildings with teal and ochre facades line the square, and the waterfront tower becomes visible in the distance. More villagers populate this area, including a woman in a green headscarf who passes by closely.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with market stalls and colorful architecture

events.description: a small dog runs across the cobblestone path from right to left

agents.ego_description: Geralt strolls through the village square, observing the colorful architecture and navigating around a central stone well

notable_agents.action: small dog running across the cobblestones in front of Geralt

entered.detail: wooden market stall with canvas awning and goods displayed
circular stone well or planter in the center of the square
building with warm yellow walls glowing in the golden hour light
traditional house with exposed wooden beams and plaster infill

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the vibrant village square, passing by a market stall and colorful half-timbered houses. The stone tower near the waterfront grows larger in view as he navigates around a central well, while a small dog darts across his path.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with tower and lake view

events.description: Geralt slows slightly and turns left as he approaches the tower plaza

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks toward the waterfront tower, with the lake glinting in the distance and fewer villagers in this open area

entered.detail: sparkling blue water of the lake visible between the buildings
open cobblestone plaza leading toward the water's edge
neatly trimmed cypress trees lining the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens toward the waterfront as Geralt approaches the tall stone tower. The lake sparkles in the golden sunlight beyond the village, with mountains framing the horizon. The path widens into a promenade with neatly trimmed trees as the character nears the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, shadowed alleyway into a vibrant, sun-drenched waterfront village. It begins with Geralt descending a cobblestone street flanked by stone walls, where long golden shadows stretch across the path toward a distant view of mountains and a lake. As the camera moves forward, the narrow passage opens through a grand stone archway into a bustling square lined with teal and ochre facades and populated by passing villagers. The scene then expands through the heart of the village, passing market stalls and a central well before the view shifts toward a towering stone structure by the water. Finally, the path widens into a tree-lined promenade as the character approaches the waterfront, where the sparkling lake and framing mountains fully reveal themselves under the golden hour light.
